name: Onyx Security
oneliner: Onyx Security builds the secure AI control plane for the agentic era, providing enterprises with continuous discovery, monitoring, and governance of AI agents in real time.
finserv: Fortune 500 companies — including financial services firms — already using Onyx's control plane to govern AI agents; audit trails, real-time policy enforcement, and human-approval workflows map directly to FINRA's 2026 Regulatory Oversight Report governance expectations for broker-dealers and asset managers
team: Team of 70 at launch after 18 months in stealth. Backed by Conviction Partners (early-stage AI-focused fund) and Cyberstarts (Israeli cyber VC behind Wiz, Cyera, and others).
thesis: This gives you a potential infrastructure partner — or acquisition signal — for the governance layer every financial institution will need before it can deploy AI agents at scale. As the regulated infrastructure layer for agentic AI, you could white-label or partner with Onyx's control plane to offer banks and wealth managers a credentialed, auditable agent governance stack, removing a critical blocker to enterprise adoption.
